rowObjects.data:
{{
{
  rowIndex: typeof this.params.rowIndex !== "undefined"
    ? this.params.rowIndex
    : typeof (TicketsTable.updatedRow || {}).rowIndex !== "undefined"
      ? (TicketsTable.updatedRow || {}).rowIndex
      : typeof (TicketsTable.triggeredRow || {}).rowIndex !== "undefined"
        ? (TicketsTable.triggeredRow || {}).rowIndex
        : (TicketsTable.selectedRow || {}).rowIndex,
  Status: this.params.status || (TicketsTable.updatedRow || {}).Status || (TicketsTable.triggeredRow || {}).Status || (TicketsTable.selectedRow || {}).Status || "Open",
  AdminNotes: typeof this.params.adminNotes !== "undefined"
    ? (this.params.adminNotes || "").toString().trim()
    : typeof (TicketsTable.updatedRow || {}).AdminNotes !== "undefined"
      ? (((TicketsTable.updatedRow || {}).AdminNotes || "").toString().trim())
      : ((((TicketsTable.triggeredRow || {}).AdminNotes || (TicketsTable.selectedRow || {}).AdminNotes || "").toString().trim())),
  UpdatedAt: this.params.updatedAt || moment().format("YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss")
}
}}
